name: codebase-walkthrough
description: Generate/update an interactive, self-contained offline HTML walkthrough that teaches any codebase — architecture (C4), guided code-walk, per-entrypoint call-flow lifecycles, animated runtime pipeline, roadmap/task status, and a dev build/install/run guide. Ships the codebase-walkthrough skill + a /walkthrough command. Python / React-TS / C# / SQL.
